## Agent / Packet Identity

- Agent identifier:
- Model/tool:
- Packet ID:
- Branch:
- PR type:

Provide a stable agent identifier so multiple Codex agents can be distinguished. Accepted examples include a Codex agent session ID, a GUID generated by the agent, or the branch name if no GUID/session ID is available.

What changed and why:

## Files Changed

- `path/to/file`: short purpose

## Scope Control

- [ ] I changed only files in the assigned packet scope.
- [ ] I did not make opportunistic unrelated edits.
- [ ] I did not edit RTL unless the packet explicitly allowed RTL edits.
- [ ] I did not edit testbenches unless the packet explicitly allowed TB edits.
- [ ] I did not edit scripts/workflows unless the packet explicitly allowed it.
